title: Příkaz mini install-statusline
goal: Add a visible mini install-statusline command (the install counterpart to mini uninstall) that enables the mini status line via the existing installStatusline() — adding the statusLine block to ~/.claude/settings.json, never overwriting a foreign one and preserving other keys — with --dry-run and a clear summary, plus docs (README + docs/non-interactive/install-statusline.md) and updated pointers from the postinstall opt-in hint and mini uninstall.

steps.title: install-statusline command logic
steps.detail: New src/commands/install-statusline.ts: calls installStatusline(); --dry-run previews; prints a clear summary distinguishing added / already enabled (mini's own) / left a foreign statusLine untouched (via isMiniStatusline on the current file). Names the ~/.claude/settings.json path.

steps.title: Wire visible mini install-statusline into CLI
steps.detail: Add a visible install-statusline command in cli.ts with --dry-run, delegating to the new command.

steps.title: Update pointers
steps.detail: Postinstall opt-in hint points to mini install-statusline; mini uninstall note/related and the install-commands docs mention it as the enable counterpart.

steps.title: Tests for install-statusline
steps.detail: Added on missing/empty file, idempotent when mini's already present, leaves a foreign statusLine untouched, --dry-run writes nothing.

steps.title: Docs: README + page + index
steps.detail: Update the README opt-in wording, add docs/non-interactive/install-statusline.md (console-only) per convention, add an index row under Install & cleanup.

steps.title: Verify: typecheck, tests, --help, smoke
steps.detail: npm run typecheck + npm test green; mini --help lists install-statusline; smoke test in an isolated HOME (added -> idempotent -> foreign left intact).
